title: Apply for a shooting club licence
description: Apply for a licence so a shooting club can operate in Barbados.
summary: Under Section 12 of the Firearms Act, every shooting club must hold a current licence.
who_can_apply: a registered shooting club with at least one approved range
the secretary or chairperson of the club

items: the full name of the club
the address of the club and every range
the names of every officer and committee member
the names of every member who will use firearms at the club
the types of firearms the club uses

items.name: List of members with their firearm licence details
Range safety plan and inspection report
Two passport-size photographs of the club secretary
Proof of payment of the application fee

fees: Pay the licence fee at the Barbados Revenue Authority before you apply.
how_long: A decision usually takes 10 to 14 weeks.

options.heading: In person
content: Hand the completed Form D Application for a Shooting Club Licence in to Police Headquarters, Roebuck Street, St. Michael.

contact.address:
Police Headquarters
Roebuck Street
St. Michael
